title: eriobotrya dubia
intro: Eriobotrya dubia, also known as the Chinese or Indian plum, is a small tree species native to the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains flavonoids and phenolic compounds that possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriobotrya dubia include its potential to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, powder, or infusion, and is used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, often in combination with other herbs.
